mapper.select:
SELECT REWARD_ITEM_ID as rewardItemId, NAME, DESCRIPTION, PRICE_POINT as pricePoint, STOCK, STATUS, CREATED_AT as createdAt FROM LQ_REWARD_ITEM WHERE STATUS != 'DELETED'
AND STATUS = #{status}
AND NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY REWARD_ITEM_ID DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LQ_REWARD_ITEM ( REWARD_ITEM_ID, NAME, DESCRIPTION, PRICE_POINT, STOCK, STATUS, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_LQ_REWARD_ITEM_PK.NEXTVAL, #{name}, #{description}, #{pricePoint}, #{stock}, #{status}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE LQ_REWARD_ITEM SET NAME = #{name}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, PRICE_POINT = #{pricePoint}, STOCK = #{stock}, STATUS = #{status} WHERE REWARD_ITEM_ID = #{rewardItemId}
